CLINICAL SITES
MISSION BRIEFING
The Enemy: Post-Stroke VFD
A devastating neurological condition affecting millions — with zero effective treatments available worldwide.
1 in 4
Adults will have a stroke
at some point in their lives
2nd
Leading cause of death
worldwide
1st
Cause of permanent
disability globally
⚠ CRITICAL: No Proven Therapy Exists
Vision loss following stroke is caused by disruption of neural pathways, not eye damage. Even with healthy eyes, the brain cannot process visual information from the affected field — creating a permanent blind spot. Current guidelines offer only compensatory strategies.
VISUAL IMPAIRMENT
20~25%
of stroke survivors — No validated treatment
COGNITIVE IMPAIRMENT
~40%
of stroke survivors — No evidence-based therapy
LANGUAGE IMPAIRMENT
30~40%
of stroke survivors — Therapy highly limited
SKILL TREE
Our Solution
VPL
Neuro-
plasticity
FIRST-IN-CLASS
Visual Perceptual Learning
Digital Therapeutics
VividBrain delivers patient-customized, repetitive visual stimuli to induce functional recovery by activating dormant neural circuits through neuroplasticity.
MFDS INNOVATIVE MEDICAL DEVICE
01
Diagnosis & Mapping
Humphrey Visual Field test maps the patient's specific visual field defect pattern with precision.
02
Personalized Training
AI adapts stimulus location & difficulty via VR headset based on each patient's VFD profile.
03
Neural Rewiring
12-week protocol (30 min/day) activates neuroplasticity — fMRI confirms increased visual cortex connectivity.
EQUIPMENT
Legendary Item: VividBrain
13 years of research by neuroscientists, neurologists and engineers. VR-based personalized visual training adapting in real-time to each patient's visual field defect pattern.
VR HEADSET
AI-ADAPTIVE
HOME-BASED
TELE-MONITORED
Smart Adaptation
Auto-adjusts stimulus per patient's VFD profile and performance
Training Modules
Orientation + Rotation Discrimination tasks for comprehensive visual training
Tele-monitoring
Physician dashboard tracks compliance, progress & outcomes remotely
149% Avg. Compliance
Patients voluntarily exceed prescribed training — driven by motivation
BATTLE REPORT
Clinical Evidence
JAMA NETWORK OPEN 2025 — Randomized Clinical Trial · 104 Patients · 12 Centers
PRIMARY ENDPOINT — Improved VF Area (whole field)
Training
194.1 deg²
Control
82.5 deg²
P = .003 — 2.4× improvement vs. control
SECONDARY ENDPOINT — Improved VF in defective hemifield
Training
158.9 deg²
Control
72.0 deg²
P = .002 — Recovery even in damaged zones
Real-World Evidence (n=117)
70.1%
Responder Rate
(meaningful improvement ≥ 108 deg²)
9.6 pts
Avg. Improvement Points
(HVF score)
1.78×
RWE Superiority
vs. Pivotal Study
WORLD MAP
Market Opportunity
TAM
$18B+
Global Neuro DTx
SAM
$4.2B
Post-stroke VFD
SOM
$680M
Zero Competition
No FDA/CE/MFDS-cleared therapeutic exists for post-stroke VFD. First-in-class with no direct competitor worldwide.
Global Demand
15M+ stroke survivors annually. 20~25% develop VFD — a massive, underserved patient population across every geography.
Expansion Pipeline
VPL platform extends to cognitive impairment, language disorders, and pediatric visual perception (Nu.T already designated).
